case_title: JACQUELINE MOHANNA VS. KING STREET TRADING, LLC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NONE) SERVED SEP-17-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KING STREET TRADING, LLC. DBA    MULBERRYS GARMENT CARE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOHANNA, JACQUELINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KING STREET TRADING, LLC. DBA    MULBERRYS GARMENT CARE $2,895.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,970.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF MOHANNA, JACQUELINE ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,680.00 FILED BY MOHANNA, JACQUELINE AS TO DEFENDANT KING STREET TRADING, LLC. DBA    MULBERRYS GARMENT CARE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GOENEVELD. PLAINTIFF JACQUELINE MOHANNA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KING STREET TRADING LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARC RATNER VICE PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT KING STREET TRADING LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEPHEN LUKE PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT KING STREET TRADING LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MOLLY COOP DIRECTOR OF CALIFORNIA STORES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GOENEVELD; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
